description: Black synthetic sling bag with a silver fabric innerOne main roomy zippered compartment with two zippered pockets on both sides of the insideTwo external zippered compartments, one in the front and one at the backSynthetic leather detailing along the zipper of the main compartmentSingle non-adjustable shoulder strap with synthetic leather panelsBranded zippers and sliders for easy useNylon bonded thread for long lifeBrand name printed in large lettering with branding at the bottomWarranty: 1 year from the date of purchase, against manufacturing defects
